steps.title: Identify the disagreement
steps.content: Text 2 argues that full-time work prevents poetry practice. Lorde's position is opposite: poets can develop their craft while working other jobs.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly states Lorde's counter-argument: people can gain poetry experience while working full-time jobs.

The other three address topics—earning from poetry, funding training, or specializing in multiple art forms—that Lorde doesn't engage with.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
